title: Fog Looks Good Now
description: Helps fog look better by moving the fog start closer. Additionally, adds cave fog and biome specific fog density.
body: Fog Looks Good Now creates a greater sense of depth and atmosphere in Minecraft by shifting the fog start forward, maintaining the same view distance while greatly improving the visuals of the game. In addition to this, the mod adds configurable cave fog and biome-specific fog densities.
